name: BIEM.L.FDLKK Garment Co.,Ltd.
summary: BIEM.L.FDLKK Garment Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, brand promoting, and marketing of golf apparel in China. It offers products in life, fashion, golf, and holiday travel series categories under the Biyinlefin brand name. The company operates 600 terminal stores primarily in shopping malls, airports, golf clubs, etc. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
